title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_c0f53763.jpg)

2. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_759ad4a2.jpg)

3. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_a7d986ef.jpg)

4. **Excalibur**
*2026*
Compete, connive, and outwit your rivals to claim Excalibur as your own.
![Excalibur](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_33598a41.jpg)

5. **Medico**
*2026*
Medieval traveling barbers on their way to becoming a famous medicus.
![Medico](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_82ca8874.jpg)

6. **Lands of Evershade**
*2026*
 Hybrid RPG/board game combines storytelling, tactical combat, and dice-based system.
![Lands of Evershade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_6da7664b.png)

7. **DNUP**
*2025*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![DNUP](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_db595b45.jpg)

8. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_c560d0f8.png)

9. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_c5232079.jpg)

10. **Friendly Fishing**
*2026*
A casual day on the pond. Catch some nice fish and help your buddy catch some too.
![Friendly Fishing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_68f42b54.jpg)

11. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_d5f73ed9.jpg)

12. **Rebirth**
*2024*
Rebuild old lands in a lush, hopeful future.
![Rebirth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_fe7daee5.png)

13. **Nemesis: Retaliation**
*2025*
Highly trained marines enter an alien nest with strict orders and advanced tools.
![Nemesis: Retaliation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_18858f97.jpg)

14. **Stonesaga**
*2026*
Cooperative survival crafting board game set in a unique and persistent world.
![Stonesaga](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_583caeab.jpg)

15. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_eb6f0215.png)

16. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_c604c1ad.jpg)

17. **Vantage**
*2025*
Explore an entire planet's open world from a first-person perspective.
![Vantage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_17d8adc7.jpg)

18. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_df0546d7.png)

19. **Deep Regrets**
*2025*
A game about fishing progressively more horrifying things out of the ocean.
![Deep Regrets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_d1f3256c.jpg)

20. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_f3d2c92a.jpg)

21. **Feya's Swamp**
*2025*
Rise as the most prosperous clan in this magical swamp.
![Feya's Swamp](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_1745054f.png)

22. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_16a0e9ba.jpg)

23. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_003eb592.jpg)

24. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_7493eb57.jpg)

25. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_d8c07c11.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*17 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_8d4aeefa.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*25 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_c84f53c4.jpg)

3. **Ark Nova**
*53 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_162b00ed.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*20 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_7d17defb.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*89 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_1c8f2181.jpg)

6. **Azul**
*103 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_68289814.png)

7. **Bomb Busters**
*13 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_a9f36aa1.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*116 months on the list*

9. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*35 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_11bea987.jpg)

10. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*42 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_36ab0258.jpg)

11. **Cascadia**
*58 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_c3b30d1e.jpg)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*32 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_562ec417.jpg)

13. **Hot Streak**
*4 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_8827183f.jpg)

14. **Faraway**
*25 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_2bd4303c.png)

15. **The Gang**
*11 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_b19f6b04.jpg)

16. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*65 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_77b63004.jpg)

17. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*18 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_4a4a4735.jpg)

*4 months on the list*

*5 months on the list*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.

25. **SCOUT**
*42 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.
![SCOUT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-06/toplist/bgg_67810698.png)
